calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the motion meets the requirements of the Health and Safety Code. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220 =302/ru

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Intervene
Off Calendar Jun-22-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Lucas T. Novak, Tel. No. 1-323-337-9015 appearing for the proposed intervenor APS&EE;
Atty. Clifford A. Chanler of the Chanler Group, Tel. No. 1-510-848-8880 appearing
for the Plaintiff by telephone appearance;
Atty. Joshua A. Blook of the Meyers/Nave Law Firm, tel. No. 1-510-808-2000 appearing for the Defendant World and Main.


RULING - A R G U E D; APS&EE, LLC'S Motion For Leave To Intervene is taken under submission. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR # 8600 =302/ru

* * * After hearing, the court issued an order that tracts the tentative ruling as follows: APS&EE, LLC'S Motion For Leave To Intervene - A settlement of this Proposition 65 case is calendared for three court days from now, June 27. APS&EE, however, seeks to delay the proceedings with a motion to intervene. That motion is DENIED for two reasons, each independently sufficient. First, APS&EE's memorandum violates the 15-page limit. (CRC 3.1113(d)). Second, granting the motion would only increase costs for all parties and this Court. APS&EE concedes that (1) the relief sought by the proposed settlement is appropriate and (2) its only interest is in attorney fees and costs for a less-comprehensive Proposition 65 case it filed against the same defendant in Los Angeles. APS&EE cites no authority for applying CCP 387 to facts like these. * * *
